nasb.text: They attack, they lurk, They watch my steps, As they have waited to take my life.

esv.text: They stir up strife, they lurk; they watch my steps, as they have waited for my life.

cnv.text: 他們聚集在一起，埋伏著， 窺探我的腳蹤， 等候要害我的性命。

ccb.text: 他们勾结起来， 暗中监视我的行踪， 伺机害我。

csbs.text: 他们聚集、设伏、窥探我的脚踪， 伺机要害我的命。
